body: {"q": "fuzzy_file_search", "matches": [{"f": "crates/ffs-core/src/fuzzy_file_search.rs", "l": 12, "txt": "//! use ffs_search::fuzzy_file_search::{fuzzy_search_files, FuzzySearchOptions};"}, {"f": "crates/ffs-core/src/lib.rs", "l": 121, "txt": "pub mod fuzzy_file_search;"}, {"f": "demo/public/data/callees_new.json", "l": 1, "txt": "{\"q\": \"new\", \"hits\": [{\"n\": \"open\", \"f\": \"crates/ffs-core/src/dbs/query_tracker.rs\", \"l\": 88}, {\"n\": \"open\", \"f\": \"crates/ffs-core/src/dbs/frecency.rs"}, {"f": "demo/public/data/files.json", "l": 1, "txt": "{\"pattern\":\"**\",\"matches\":[\"AGENTS.md\",\"CLAUDE.md\",\"Cargo.lock\",\"Cargo.toml\",\"LICENSE\",\"Makefile\",\"README.md\",\"_typos.toml\",\"assets/logo-dark.png\",\"as"}, {"f": "demo/public/data/grep_RwLock.json", "l": 1, "txt": "{\"q\": \"RwLock\", \"matches\": [{\"f\": \"AGENTS.md\", \"l\": 69, \"txt\": \"- Be very careful around locking - prefer RwLock over Mutex for read-heavy workloads\"}"}, {"f": "demo/public/data/sym_default.json", "l": 1, "txt": "{\"q\": \"default\", \"hits\": [{\"n\": \"default\", \"k\": \"function_item\", \"f\": \"crates/ffs-engine/src/dispatch.rs\", \"l\": 33}, {\"n\": \"default\", \"k\": \"function_i"}, {"f": "scripts/extract-demo-data.sh", "l": 72, "txt": "for pattern in \"fn \" \"struct \" \"RwLock\" \"unsafe\" \"TODO\" \"fuzzy_file_search\"; do"}], "total": 8}
